_comment: 示例：选择新增的德俄意语言训练欧洲语言模型 / Example: select newly registered German, Russian and Italian

experiment._comment: name 决定独立输出目录；语言顺序决定 language ID / name selects isolated output folders; language order defines IDs
experiment.name: european_reader
experiment._comment_languages: Qwen 官方十语中的欧洲语言组合 / A European subset of Qwen's official ten languages

generation._comment: 只从 CSV 选择上方启用的语言 / Select only enabled languages from the CSV

voice._comment: 先设计参考音色，再跨语言克隆 / Design a reference voice, then clone it across languages
voice.speaker: voice_01
voice.prompt: A warm, natural adult voice with clear pronunciation and calm delivery.
voice.reference_text: Hello, this reference voice will be used for multilingual training.

training._comment: 普通用户只需调整批大小和训练轮数 / Most users only need to tune batch size and epochs
